global_description: A medium-sized bird with an elongated body and a sleek, glossy plumage. Its feathers are predominantly iridescent blue-green, with a metallic sheen that shifts in color under light. The bird has a slender, pointed beak and bright yellow eyes that contrast with its dark head.

part_details.plumage: Glossy, iridescent feathers with a blue-green hue, metallic sheen.
part_details.eyes: Bright yellow, round, contrasting with the dark head.
part_details.beak: Slender, pointed, black, suitable for insect foraging.
part_details.head: Dark, smooth, with a glossy finish, contrasting with the body.

spatial_relations: The slender beak protrudes from the front of the dark head.
The bright yellow eyes are set on either side of the head.
The iridescent plumage covers the entire body, creating a seamless transition from head to tail.
